mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where we believe your sense of entitlement should be rewarded!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this-the other day, I walk into this fancy restaurant, right? I stroll in like I own the place, because, well, I practically do with my level of entitlement. So, I sit down and order the most lavish meal on the menu, because, of course, I deserve nothing but the best.But then, disaster strikes. My steak arrives a tad overcooked. Can you believe the audacity? I immediately summon the waiter, and with a dramatic flair, I proclaim, "This steak is an insult to my taste buds!" I demand to speak to the chef and proceed to lecture him on the art of cooking, as if I'm some culinary genius.The chef, clearly intimidated by my superior knowledge, offers to prepare a new steak himself. And let me tell you, that second steak was perfection. As I took each succulent bite, I couldn't help but feel a rush of satisfaction. My entitlement had triumphed once again, proving that in my world, perfection is the only option.
